nodes.name: Get Monitoring Configs
nodes.notes: Fetch all active monitoring configurations from Supabase

nodes.name: Split Into Items
nodes.notes: Process each competitor monitoring config separately

parameters.prompt:
=You are a competitor intelligence analyst with real-time web access.

**Search for news about {{ $json.competitor_name }} published in the last 24 hours:**

1. Search for "{{ $json.competitor_name }} news {{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}"
2. Search for "{{ $json.competitor_name }} {{ $json.keywords.join(' ') }} 2025"
3. Visit {{ $json.competitor_domain }} and check /newsroom, /press-releases, or /blog
4. Check tech news sites: TechCrunch, VentureBeat, TechTarget for mentions
5. Search LinkedIn for recent posts by {{ $json.competitor_name }}

**Return ONLY valid JSON with this structure:**
```json
{
  "activities": [
    {
      "title": "Exact headline or title",
      "summary": "2-3 sentence summary of the news",
      "full_content": "Full article text if available (max 500 words)",
      "alert_type": "news|funding|product_launch|pricing_change|acquisition|partnership|leadership_change",
      "source_url": "https://exact-url.com/article",
      "source_domain": "techcrunch.com",
      "published_at": "2025-02-07T10:30:00Z",
      "sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
      "priority": "low|medium|high|critical",
      "reasoning": "Why this is important for competitive intelligence"
    }
  ],
  "no_news": false,
  "search_summary": "Brief summary of search results"
}
```

**CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:**
- ONLY include news from the LAST 24 HOURS
- If NO recent news found, return {"activities": [], "no_news": true}
- Prioritize: funding announcements (critical), product launches (high), pricing changes (high), general news (medium)
- Include source_url for EVERY activity
- Determine sentiment based on news content (positive for growth/wins, negative for layoffs/setbacks)

**Competitor**: {{ $json.competitor_name }}
**Domain**: {{ $json.competitor_domain }}
**Industry**: {{ $json.industry }}
**Keywords to track**: {{ $json.keywords.join(', ') }}

nodes.name: Search Competitor News (Groq Compound)
nodes.notes: Use Groq Compound's web tools to search for competitor news in last 24h

nodes.name: Parse and Transform Activities
nodes.notes: Parse Groq JSON response and generate content hashes for deduplication

nodes.name: Send Alert to Backend (Webhook)
nodes.notes: POST each activity to backend webhook - backend handles deduplication and user targeting
